top.name: OpenAI Build Week
requirements: public repository or shared private repository
working demo URL or testable build
top.notes: Best immediate fit because it rewards Codex-assisted building and judge-ready artifacts.

recommendation.wedge: A Codex-powered command center that ranks hackathons and generates a judge-ready sprint plan.
recommendation.killerWorkflow: Paste or load hackathon opportunities → score fit → pick target → generate sprint plan, asset checklist, and judge receipt.
firstDemo: Display required assets and missing evidence

requiredAssets.label: Live demo URL
requiredAssets.nextStep: Publish the static dashboard after the first UI pass.

requiredAssets.label: Public GitHub repository
requiredAssets.nextStep: Split or publish this project folder as a focused repo.

requiredAssets.label: Public YouTube demo under 3 minutes
requiredAssets.nextStep: Record the ranked-opportunity → sprint-plan → judge-pack flow.

requiredAssets.label: Local proof command
requiredAssets.nextStep: Run npm run verify before each submission checkpoint.

requiredAssets.label: /feedback Codex Session ID
requiredAssets.nextStep: Add the session ID from the project thread before final submission.

receipt.claim: CAT can turn hackathon discovery and submission into a repeatable operating system.
evidence: Data-driven opportunity score with explicit assumptions
Generated sprint plan tied to deadline pressure
Submission asset checklist with ready/planned/needs-human statuses
Local proof command that regenerates judge artifacts
humanApprovalNeeded: Any use of private credentials or paid services
safeBoundaries: No real-money trading or gambling execution
